Docs.summary: The policy assignment.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property AssignmentType As Nullable(Of PolicyAssignmentType)

Docs.summary: The type of policy assignment. Possible values are NotSpecified, System, SystemHidden, and Custom. Immutable.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.DefinitionVersion : string with get, set

Docs.summary: The version of the policy definition to use.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.Description : string with get, set

Docs.summary: This message will be part of response in case of policy violation.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.DisplayName : string with get, set

Docs.summary: The display name of the policy assignment.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property EffectiveDefinitionVersion As String

Docs.summary: The effective version of the policy definition in use. This is only present if requested via the $expand query parameter.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property EnforcementMode As Nullable(Of PolicyEnforcementMode)

Docs.summary: The policy assignment enforcement mode. Possible values are Default, DoNotEnforce, and Enroll.
The managed identity associated with the policy assignment.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property InstanceId As String

Docs.summary: The instance ID of the policy assignment. This ID only and always changes when the assignment is deleted and recreated.

Docs.summary: The latest version of the policy definition available. This is only present if requested via the $expand query parameter.

member this.Location : Nullable<Azure.Core.AzureLocation> with get, set

Docs.summary: The location of the policy assignment. Only required when utilizing managed identity.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.Metadata : BinaryData with get, set

Docs.summary: The policy assignment metadata. Metadata is an open ended object and is typically a collection of key value pairs.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property NonComplianceMessages As IList(Of PolicyNonComplianceMessage)

Docs.summary: The messages that describe why a resource is non-compliant with the policy.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property NotScopes As IList(Of String)

Docs.summary: The policy's excluded scopes.

Docs.summary: The policy property value override.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Parameters As IDictionary(Of String, PolicyParameterValue)

Docs.summary: The parameter values for the assigned policy rule. The keys are the parameter names.
